properties: Anil bojeri has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential therapeutic properties. Its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Anil bojeri may also possess wound-healing and immunomodulatory properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant's bioactive compounds are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects. Further studies are necessary to fully understand the therapeutic potential of Anil bojeri.
